_comment: Thresholds for Android Emulator Release perf guard. Metrics: tokensStartMs (Home:refresh:start:tokens timestamp), tokensSpanMs (done-start), functionCallCount (#lines in function_call.log). Values are absolute; trigger when median > threshold (strategy=median).
_baseline_note: Computed from sample sessions perf-mkms9jh6-cc9jxv / perf-mkms9u6k-g5idj5 / perf-mkmsa47o-rbclnl with +10% tolerance.
